directions.openErrorBody: Try again or open your maps app manually to get to this place.
directions.unavailableBody: We couldn't find valid coordinates to open navigation to this place.

location.alreadyVisitedBody: This place was already stamped in your passport.
location.permissionBody: Enable location permission to stamp this place.
location.tooFarBody: You need to be closer to this place to stamp your passport.
location.unavailableBody: We couldn't validate your location to stamp this place.
